slides.title: A *single number* for your heart's hidden age
slides.sub: A coronary calcium scan measures hardened plaque already in your arteries. It turns a quiet, decades-long process into something you can finally see.

slides.title: Plaque builds in silence
slides.body: Arteries can stiffen for *decades* with no symptoms. By the time something is felt, the process is often well underway.

slides.title: A quick CT scan
slides.body: A coronary calcium scan is a fast CT that looks for hardened plaque in your heart's arteries. No needles, no dye, just a few minutes.

slides.title: Your CAC score
slides.body: The scan returns one score. A zero is reassuring, while a higher number *signals more plaque* and a reason to act earlier.

slides.title: It reshapes the plan
slides.body: Your score can support smarter choices on statins, blood pressure and lifestyle. It *is linked to* future heart risk better than guesswork.

slides.title: The number isn't destiny
slides.body: A high score is a starting point, not a verdict. Daily habits *can support* a calmer trajectory from here forward.

slides.title: Protect your heart, *every day*
slides.body: A scan is one snapshot. Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the habits behind your heart stay on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Heart disease builds quietly for decades. A coronary calcium scan turns that invisible process into one clear number. 🫀🌿

What it is, what the CAC score means, and why it can reshape how aggressively you protect your heart. Save this for your next checkup. 🔖

Vibe Health keeps the daily habits behind a healthy heart on track → link in bio.
